title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!
